title: Hidden Murder
overview: Eva is in a happy moment of her life with her new partner, Nazario, and his daughter Alicia. But an encounter with her ex, José, opens the door to complicated situations that will send her on a journey of fear that has terrible consequences for everyone. Nothing is what it seems.
